_readme: Cleo workspace config — copy this file to cleo.config.json at the repo root
(or point the CLEO_CONFIG_PATH env var at it) and edit the four keys below.
Precedence: environment variables (.env) > this file > built-in defaults.
JSON has no comments, so keys starting with '_' are ignored by the loader.
_github_repo: owner/repo Cleo ingests issues from and escalates urgent churn risks to. Env GITHUB_DEMO_REPO wins. The token itself (GITHUB_TOKEN) is a secret and stays in .env.
_corpus_dirs: Directories of YOUR documents — call transcripts, meeting notes, support exports as .md drop-ins. Multiple roots allowed; relative paths resolve against the repo root. Env CORPUS_DIR (single dir) wins.
_model: Gemini model id. Env CLEO_MODEL wins.
